all_recent.body:
*** The Huntress Agent has already remediated this incident. ***

Host: Carol - https://technijian.huntress.io/org/450115/agents/11801533
Organization: SGC-Siege Consulting
Tags: None
Security Products: Windows Defender, CrowdStrike (CSFalconService)

Incident Report: https://technijian.huntress.io/org/450115/infection_reports/1461958
Severity: Low

Investigative Summary
---------------------
Huntress detected the following Malware Artifacts on this host:
- An artifact from persistent malware. The executable file has been removed, but the persistence mechanism used to start it is still present.

Considering the low risk posed, you can follow the below remediation guidance at your convenience.

Remediation Instructions
------------------------
To remediate, perform the actions below:
- Audit the "c:\users\cmagg\appdata\roaming\microsoft\windows\start menu\roaming\wv_advanced_test" directory for other suspicious files; remove the directory if not required.
- Remove the "c:\users\cmagg\appdata\roaming\microsoft\windows\start menu\programs\startup\remotecheck_v4.lnk" file and ensure it is not recreated.

Footholds
---------
Foothold 1 - https://technijian.huntress.io/org/450115/autoruns/36095807
Startup Path: c:\users\cmagg\appdata\roaming\microsoft\windows\start menu\programs\startup\remotecheck_v4.lnk
Command: c:\users\cmagg\appdata\roaming\microsoft\windows\start menu\Roaming\Wv_Advanced_test\ABRequestDlg.exe 
File Path: 

-------------------------
Thanks again for trusting Huntress and please don't hesitate to reach out to incidents@huntress.io if you have any questions.

parameters.name: remediation
parameters.description: A reboot is required to complete the remediation plan

all_recent.subject: LOW - Incident on Carol (SGC-Siege Consulting)
